name: Hurricane
description: A Mardi Gras cocktail with BACARDÍ Carta Negra and Carta Blanca rum, brightened by orange, lime, passionfruit, and grenadine. Big in New Orleans and served to this day in the French Quarter, the Hurricane is truly the drink of Mardi Gras.
recipe_steps: Combine all ingredients in a shaker with plenty of ice.
Strain into a hurricane glass filled with ice.
Garnish with a lemon wheel, orange peel and a cherry.
searchable_text: Hurricane main rum BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum A Mardi Gras cocktail with BACARDÍ Carta Negra and Carta Blanca rum, brightened by orange, lime, passionfruit, and grenadine. Big in New Orleans and served to this day in the French Quarter, the Hurricane is truly the drink of Mardi Gras. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum, 37.5 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, 50 ml orange juice, 25 ml lime juice, 25 ml passionfruit syrup, 1 tsp grenadine syrup recipe steps Combine all ingredients in a shaker with plenty of ice. Shake vigorously. Strain into a hurricane glass filled with ice. Garnish with a lemon wheel, orange peel and a cherry.
